## Verses (6)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | The Lord takes care of me as his sheep; I will not be without any good thing. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | He makes a resting-place for me in the green fields: he is my guide by the quiet waters. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | He gives new life to my soul: he is my guide in the ways of righteousness because of his name. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | Yes, though I go through the valley of deep shade, I will have no fear of evil; for you are with me, your rod and your support are my comfort. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | You make ready a table for me in front of my haters: you put oil on my head; my cup is overflowing. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | Truly, blessing and mercy will be with me all the days of my life; and I will have a place in the house of the Lord all my days. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
